This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] Assign String to SVGScriptElement.innerHTML.
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: Failed to set the 'data' property on 'HTMLObjectElement': This document requires 'TrustedScriptURL' assignment."

  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: Failed to set the 'data' property on 'HTMLObjectElement': This document requires 'TrustedScriptURL' assignment."
[FAIL] Assign TrustedHTML to SVGScriptElement.innerHTML and execute it.
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: Failed to set the 'data' property on 'HTMLObjectElement': This document requires 'TrustedScriptURL' assignment."
